rows.label: tev022702_MSG0001
rows.name:
Are you the survivor who was
found asleep in that Lifepod?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022702_MSG0002
rows.name:
I heard you faced a lot of indigens
out there. It's like you rolled out
of bed and onto a battlefield![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022702_MSG0003
rows.name:
Look, I'm no specialist, but
if I were you, I'd worry that
I pushed my body too far.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022702_MSG0004
rows.name:
You should head over to the administrative
district for a medical checkup, or
at the very least some rest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022702_MSG0005
rows.name:
I don't know what you intend to do now
that you're here, but it can wait until
you've taken care of yourself.[ST:wait ]
